title: Assistant district attorneys
doc_html:
§163. Assistant district attorneys

           The offices of first and second assistant district attorneys for the Sixth Judicial District are created.

           Amended by Acts 1968, No. 153, §1.
doc_text:
§163.  Assistant district attorneys
The offices of first and second assistant district attorneys for the Sixth
Judicial District are created.
Amended by Acts 1968, No. 153, §1.
